Front:
راح
(rāḥ)
Back:
to go
Example:
أنا بروح عالبيت
ana brouḥ ʿal-beit
I go home

Front:
إجا
(ija)
Back:
to come
Example:
إجا لعندي
ija la-ʿandi
He came to me

Front:
أكل
(akal)
Back:
to eat
Example:
أنا باكل هلأ
ana bakol hallaʾ
I'm eating now

Front:
شرب
(shereb)
Back:
to drink
Example:
بدي اشرب مي
baddi eshrab may
I want to drink water

Front:
شاف
(shāf)
Back:
to see
Example:
شفت الفيلم
shefet el-film
I saw the movie

Front:
سمع
(semeʿ)
Back:
to hear / listen
Example:
عم بسمع موسيقى
ʿam basmaʿ mūsīʔa
I'm listening to music

Front:
عرف
(ʿeref)
Back:
to know
Example:
أنا بعرف
ana baʿrif
I know

Front:
فهم
(fhem)
Back:
to understand
Example:
أنا بفهم شوي عربي
ana bfham shway ʿarabi
I understand a little Arabic

Front:
حكى
(ḥaka)
Back:
to speak
Example:
عم بحكي عربي
ʿam baḥki ʿarabi
I'm speaking Arabic

Front:
درس
(daras)
Back:
to study
Example:
أنا بدرس اليوم
ana bdrus el-yom
I'm studying today
